task_goal: Edit note_SiFbv.txt in Markor. Add to the top of the note Hello, World!
task_goal_rewrite: The note_SiFbv.txt file in Markor has "Hello, World!" added as the first line at the top of the note.

checkpoints.description: Markor application is opened and the note_SiFbv.txt file is successfully loaded in the editor interface.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing Markor open with the title/filename "note_SiFbv.txt" visible and the note's content displayed in the editing area.

checkpoints.description: The cursor is positioned at the very start (top-left corner) of the note's content, before any existing text.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the cursor placed at the first character position of the note, before any existing lines or text.

checkpoints.description: The text "Hello, World!" is typed at the top position of the note.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing "Hello, World!" as the first line of the note, above any original content.

checkpoints.description: The edited note_SiFbv.txt file is saved in Markor.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing a save confirmation indicator (e.g., saved icon, status bar message) or the file reloaded with the added "Hello, World!" still present at the top.

success_rule: All required checkpoints are satisfied, and the final state of note_SiFbv.txt in Markor has "Hello, World!" as the first line at the top of the note with the changes saved.
